theme: Which Cooking Oil Is the Best?

sentences.english: We're talking about cooking oils and which products are best for our health.
sentences.korean: 요리용 기름과 건강에 가장 좋은 제품에 대해 이야기해요.

sentences.english: What do you use to cook with?
There are so many different oils we can use for our food, and some of them are very expensive and claim to have big health benefits.
sentences.korean: 음식에 사용할 수 있는 매우 다양한 기름이 있고, 일부는 매우 비싸면서 큰 건강상 이점이 있다고 주장해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Which Cooking Oil Is the Best?
